name: French Onion Soup with Croutons
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the onions finely.
2. Sauté the onions in butter until they are tender.
3. Add water, bouillon cubes, and Kitchen Bouquet to a pot.
4. Simmer for 20 minutes.
5. Serve with croutons.
6. Toast bread slices under the broiler.
7. Spread the toast with butter, salt, pepper, garlic, paprika, and Parmesan cheese.
8. Dice the finished dish.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
